category: 入门级民谣吉他 / Beginner Acoustic Guitars (16-35 USD)

products.type: 38寸入门民谣吉他 / 38" Beginner Acoustic
products.description_cn: LG-07 是 Smiger 最畅销的入门级38寸民谣吉他，适合初学者和学生市场。椴木面板和背侧板提供温暖音色，轻量化设计易于携带。六色可选，性价比极高。尼日利亚、非洲市场热销。
products.description_en: LG-07 is Smiger's best-selling 38" beginner acoustic guitar. Linden top/back/sides delivers warm tone. Lightweight design perfect for beginners. 6 colors available. Extremely popular in Nigeria and African markets.

products.type: 40寸入门民谣吉他 / 40" Beginner Acoustic
products.description_cn: LG-09 是 Smiger 热销款40寸缺角民谣吉他。云杉面板提供明亮音色，缺角设计方便高把位演奏。可选装EQ拾音器，适合需要扩音表演的场景。尼日利亚、缅甸市场热销型号。
products.description_en: LG-09 is a popular 40" cutaway acoustic with spruce top for bright tone. Cutaway design for easy upper-fret access. Optional EQ pickup installation. Hot seller in Nigeria and Myanmar markets.

products.type: 40寸入门民谣吉他(含EQ) / 40" Beginner Acoustic with EQ
products.eq: 4段EQ + 调音器 / 4-band EQ with tuner
products.description_cn: LG-09-EQ 是 LG-09 的EQ版本，内置4段拾音器和调音器，配连接线。即插即用，适合舞台表演和教学。缅甸市场热销，常配擦色饰面。
products.description_en: LG-09-EQ is the EQ version of LG-09 with built-in 4-band pickup and tuner, including audio cable. Plug and play for stage performance and teaching. Hot in Myanmar market, often ordered with stained finish.

products.type: 41寸入门民谣吉他 / 41" Beginner Acoustic
products.description_cn: SM-412/3 是41寸全尺寸入门民谣吉他。云杉面板+沙比利背侧板，D型琴身提供饱满音量。全封闭旋钮更稳定。尼日利亚市场热销。
products.description_en: SM-412/3 is a full-size 41" beginner dreadnought acoustic. Spruce top + sapele back/sides deliver full volume. Die-cast tuners for better stability. Hot seller in Nigeria.

category: 中档民谣吉他 / Mid-Range Acoustic Guitars (43-62 USD)

products.type: 41寸中档民谣吉他 / 41" Mid-Range Acoustic
products.strings: 达达里奥钢弦 D'Addario Steel strings
products.tuners: 全封闭镀铬旋钮 Chrome die-cast tuners
products.description_cn: M-210-41 是 Smiger 中档民谣吉他，AA级云杉面板+沙比利背侧板，桃花心木琴颈，玫瑰木指板，牛骨琴枕。X型音梁提供出色的共鸣和投射力。柬埔寨市场热销。
products.description_en: M-210-41 is a mid-range 41" acoustic with AA-grade spruce top, sapele back/sides, mahogany neck, rosewood fretboard, bone nut. X-bracing for excellent resonance. Popular in Cambodia.

products.type: 40寸中档缺角民谣吉他 / 40" Mid-Range Cutaway Acoustic
products.body_shape: 缺角圆肩 Cutaway Grand Auditorium
products.strings: 达达里奥钢弦 D'Addario Steel strings
products.tuners: 全封闭镀金旋钮 Gold die-cast tuners
products.description_cn: M-215-40 是 Smiger 面向美国市场的中档缺角民谣吉他。40寸GA型琴身提供均衡音色，哑光饰面手感舒适。桃花心木背侧板温暖甜美。美国市场热销型号之一。
products.description_en: M-215-40 is a mid-range 40" cutaway GA-style acoustic targeting the US market. Balanced tone with satin finish for comfortable feel. Mahogany back/sides for warm, sweet tone. Hot seller in USA.

products.type: 41寸中档D型民谣吉他 / 41" Mid-Range Dreadnought
products.strings: 达达里奥钢弦 D'Addario Steel strings
products.tuners: 全封闭镀铬旋钮 Chrome die-cast tuners
products.description_cn: M-410-41 是 Smiger 中档民谣吉他的旗舰。AAA级云杉面板+玫瑰木背侧板，扇形X型音梁提供丰富泛音和出色投射力。玫瑰木指板手感顺滑。柬埔寨市场热销。
products.description_en: M-410-41 is the flagship of Smiger's mid-range line. AAA-grade spruce top + rosewood back/sides, scalloped X-bracing for rich overtones. Rosewood fretboard for smooth feel. Popular in Cambodia.

products.type: 41寸中档面单民谣吉他 / 41" Mid-Range Solid Top Acoustic
products.top: 实木云杉面板 Solid Spruce Top
products.strings: 达达里奥钢弦 D'Addario Steel strings
products.tuners: 全封闭镀铬旋钮 Chrome die-cast tuners
products.description_cn: M-4160 是 Smiger 中档面单民谣吉他，实木云杉面板带来更丰富的音色和动态响应，音色随弹奏时间越来越好。沙比利背侧板提供温暖低频。尼日利亚热销。
products.description_en: M-4160 features a solid spruce top for richer tone and dynamic response that improves with playing time. Sapele back/sides for warm lows. Popular in Nigeria.

products.type: 40寸擦色民谣吉他 / 40" Stained Finish Acoustic
products.description_cn: EN/FN-10 系列是缅甸市场特供的擦色民谣吉他。独特的手工擦色饰面使每把吉他都有微妙的色彩差异。多种渐变色可选，外观时尚。缅甸市场首选。
products.description_en: EN/FN-10 series features hand-stained finishes specially designed for Myanmar market. Each guitar has subtle color variations. Multiple burst colors available. Top choice for Myanmar distribution.

products.type: 40寸擦色缺角民谣吉他 / 40" Stained Cutaway Acoustic
products.description_cn: EN/FN-20 是 EN/FN 系列的升级款，桃花心木背侧板提供更温暖的音色。擦色哑光饰面兼具美观与舒适手感。
products.description_en: EN/FN-20 upgrades the EN/FN series with mahogany back/sides for warmer tone. Stained satin finish combines aesthetics with comfortable feel.

products.type: 40寸中档擦色面单吉他 / 40" Stained Solid-Top Acoustic
products.top: 实木云杉面板 Solid Spruce Top
products.description_cn: EN/FN-25 是缅甸系列的面单款，实木云杉面板+桃花心木背侧板。赛露露包边提升档次感。面单音色更丰富，泛音更明亮。
products.description_en: EN/FN-25 is the solid-top model of the Myanmar series. Solid spruce top + mahogany back/sides with celluloid binding. Richer tone with brighter overtones.

products.type: 40寸中高档擦色全单吉他 / 40" Stained All-Solid Acoustic
products.top: 实木锡特卡云杉 Solid Sitka Spruce
products.back_sides: 实木桃花心木 Solid Mahogany
products.finish: 擦色开放漆 Stained Open Pore
products.tuners: Grover款全封闭旋钮 Grover-style die-cast tuners
products.description_cn: EN/FN-30 是缅甸系列的顶配全单款。实木锡特卡云杉面板+实木桃花心木背侧板，开放漆擦色饰面手感自然。全单配置音色出色，共鸣丰富。
products.description_en: EN/FN-30 is the top-tier all-solid model of Myanmar series. Solid Sitka spruce top + solid mahogany back/sides with stained open pore finish. Exceptional tone with rich resonance.

category: 高档民谣吉他 / High-End Acoustic Guitars (65-215 USD)

products.type: 36寸高档旅行吉他 / 36" Premium Travel Guitar
products.top: 实木锡特卡云杉 Solid Sitka Spruce
products.tuners: Grover款全封闭旋钮 Grover-style die-cast tuners
products.description_cn: SM-361 是36寸高档旅行吉他，面单云杉+桃花心木，适合旅行和小空间演奏。小巧琴身音色依然饱满。缎面饰面手感极佳。美国市场热销。
products.description_en: SM-361 is a 36" premium travel guitar with solid spruce top + mahogany. Compact body with full tone. Satin finish for great feel. Popular in USA and Europe.

products.type: 41寸高档D型面单吉他 / 41" Premium Dreadnought Solid-Top
products.top: 实木锡特卡云杉 Solid Sitka Spruce (AAA级)
products.fretboard: 玫瑰木 Rosewood (带镶嵌 with inlays)
products.tuners: Grover款全封闭旋钮 Grover-style die-cast tuners
products.rosette: 鲍鱼贝音孔装饰 Abalone rosette
products.description_cn: SM-401-A 是 Smiger 高档面单D型民谣吉他。AAA级实木云杉面板+玫瑰木背侧板，鲍鱼贝音孔装饰，赛露露包边。扇形音梁提供出色的音量和泛音。加拿大、美国市场热销。
products.description_en: SM-401-A is a premium dreadnought with AAA solid Sitka spruce top + rosewood back/sides, abalone rosette, celluloid binding. Scalloped bracing for excellent volume and overtones. Popular in Canada and USA.

products.type: 41寸高档缺角面单吉他 / 41" Premium Cutaway Solid-Top
products.top: 实木锡特卡云杉 Solid Sitka Spruce (AAA级)
products.fretboard: 玫瑰木 Rosewood (带镶嵌 with inlays)
products.tuners: Grover款全封闭旋钮 Grover-style die-cast tuners
products.rosette: 鲍鱼贝音孔装饰 Abalone rosette
products.description_cn: SM-401-C 是 SM-401-A 的缺角版本，方便高把位演奏。其余配置与 SM-401-A 相同。适合舞台演出和指弹风格。
products.description_en: SM-401-C is the cutaway version of SM-401-A for easy upper-fret access. Same specs as SM-401-A. Ideal for stage performance and fingerstyle playing.

products.type: 41寸高档全单民谣吉他 / 41" Premium All-Solid Acoustic
products.top: 实木锡特卡云杉 Solid Sitka Spruce (AAAA级)
products.tuners: Grover原装旋钮 Genuine Grover tuners
products.rosette: 鲍鱼贝音孔装饰 Abalone rosette
products.eq_option: 可选装Fishman EQ / Optional Fishman pickup
products.accessories_included: 高档加厚琴包 Premium thick gig bag
products.special_notes: 美国客户常要求：每个内标不同序列号
products.description_cn: MAS-41A 是 Smiger 高档全单民谣吉他系列的D型旗舰。AAAA级实木云杉面板+实木玫瑰木背侧板，乌木指板+鲍鱼贝镶嵌。Grover原装旋钮。可选装Fishman拾音器。美国市场高端客户首选，常配高档加厚包，每个内标做不同序列号。
products.description_en: MAS-41A is the all-solid dreadnought flagship. AAAA solid Sitka spruce + solid rosewood, ebony fretboard with abalone inlays. Genuine Grover tuners. Optional Fishman pickup. US market premium choice with custom serial numbers and thick gig bag.

products.type: 41寸高档全单电箱吉他 / 41" All-Solid Acoustic-Electric
products.top: 实木英格曼云杉 Solid Engelmann Spruce (AAAA级)
products.tuners: Grover原装旋钮 Genuine Grover tuners
products.rosette: 鲍鱼贝音孔装饰 Abalone rosette
products.accessories_included: 高档加厚琴包 Premium thick gig bag, 连接线 Cable
products.description_cn: MES-41A 是 Smiger 高档全单电箱吉他。英格曼云杉面板比锡特卡更温暖柔和，搭配Fishman Presys+拾音器系统，舞台表演首选。全实木配置，音色卓越。
products.description_en: MES-41A is a premium all-solid acoustic-electric. Engelmann spruce provides warmer, softer tone than Sitka. Equipped with Fishman Presys+ pickup system for stage performance. All-solid construction for exceptional tone.

products.type: 41寸高档D型全单玫瑰木吉他 / 41" All-Solid Rosewood Dreadnought
products.top: 实木阿迪朗达克云杉 Solid Adirondack Spruce (AAAA级)
products.back_sides: 实木印度玫瑰木 Solid Indian Rosewood
products.neck: 桃花心木 Mahogany (单件式 one-piece)
products.finish: 薄漆高光 Thin High Gloss
products.tuners: Gotoh原装旋钮 Genuine Gotoh tuners
products.bracing: 前移扇形X型音梁 Forward-shifted Scalloped X-bracing
products.rosette: 鲍鱼贝+枫木音孔装饰 Abalone + Maple rosette
products.accessories_included: 高档加厚琴包 Premium thick gig bag, 品牌琴弦 Brand strings
products.description_cn: MDS-41A 是 Smiger 顶级民谣吉他。阿迪朗达克云杉面板是最顶级的吉他面板木材，+印度玫瑰木背侧板，Gotoh原装旋钮，前移扇形音梁。薄漆工艺使振动传导更佳。每一把都是精品。
products.description_en: MDS-41A is Smiger's flagship acoustic. Adirondack spruce (the finest guitar top wood) + Indian rosewood, genuine Gotoh tuners, forward-shifted scalloped bracing. Thin lacquer for superior vibration transfer. Each guitar is a masterpiece.

products.type: 41寸指弹全单吉他 / 41" Fingerstyle All-Solid
products.top: 红松面单 Solid Red Cedar
products.back_sides: 实木桃花心木 Solid Mahogany
products.fretboard: 乌木 Ebony (无镶嵌 no inlay)
products.tuners: Grover原装旋钮 Genuine Grover tuners
products.binding: 无包边(简约设计) No binding (minimalist)
products.bracing: 指弹专用音梁 Fingerstyle-specific bracing
products.special_notes: 红松面单，指板不要镶嵌（美国客户特殊要求）
products.description_cn: M-F1SS 是 Smiger 专为指弹设计的全单吉他。红松面板比云杉更温暖，响应更快。OM琴身适合指弹的均衡音色。乌木指板无镶嵌的简约设计是美国指弹市场的偏好。开放漆手感极佳。
products.description_en: M-F1SS is designed specifically for fingerstyle. Red cedar top is warmer and more responsive than spruce. OM body for balanced fingerstyle tone. Plain ebony fretboard (no inlay) is preferred by US fingerstyle market. Open pore finish for excellent feel.

products.type: S型电吉他 / S-Style Electric Guitar
products.description_cn: SM-ST100 是经典S型电吉他，SSS拾音器配置适合布鲁斯、摇滚、流行等多种风格。椴木琴身轻巧，5色可选。适合入门套装搭配销售。
products.description_en: SM-ST100 is a classic S-style electric with versatile SSS configuration for blues, rock, pop. Lightweight basswood body. 5 colors. Ideal for beginner packs.

products.type: LP型电吉他 / LP-Style Electric Guitar
products.body: 桃花心木+枫木面板 Mahogany + Maple Top
products.description_cn: SM-LP200 是经典LP型电吉他，双线圈拾音器提供厚实温暖的音色。桃花心木琴身+枫木面板延音出色。中档电吉他市场强力卖家。
products.description_en: SM-LP200 is a classic LP-style with dual humbuckers for thick, warm tone. Mahogany body + maple cap for excellent sustain. Strong seller in mid-range electric market.

products.type: J型4弦贝斯 / J-Style 4-String Bass
products.bridge: 标准贝斯桥 Standard bass bridge
products.description_cn: SM-JB100 是经典J型贝斯，双Jazz拾音器提供多功能的打击感音色。椴木琴身轻巧，枫木琴颈手感舒适。适合入门和练习。
products.description_en: SM-JB100 is a classic J-style bass with versatile dual Jazz pickups. Lightweight basswood body, comfortable maple neck. Great for beginners.

products.type: 21寸高音尤克里里 / 21" Soprano Ukulele
products.description_cn: SM-UK21 彩色高音尤克里里，6色可选，适合玩具店、礼品店和音乐教育。极具竞争力的价格。
products.description_en: SM-UK21 colorful soprano ukulele, 6 colors, ideal for toy shops, gift stores, and music education. Extremely competitive pricing.

products.type: 23寸中音尤克里里 / 23" Concert Ukulele
products.description_cn: SM-UK23M 桃花心木中音尤克里里，温暖饱满的音色。做工扎实，适合音乐学校和零售。
products.description_en: SM-UK23M mahogany concert ukulele with warm, full tone. Solid build quality, ideal for music schools and retail.

products.type: 基础4段EQ / Basic 4-Band EQ
products.features: 4段均衡 + 调音器 / 4-band EQ + Chromatic Tuner
products.description_cn: 基础款4段EQ拾音器，带调音器功能，适合入门级吉他。
products.description_en: Basic 4-band EQ with chromatic tuner. Suitable for beginner guitars.

products.type: 高档拾音器 / Premium Pickup System
products.features: Fishman Presys+ / 音量+低音+中音+高音+相位+调音器
products.description_cn: Fishman Presys+ 高档拾音器系统，专业音质，适合中高档吉他。
products.description_en: Fishman Presys+ premium pickup system, professional sound quality for mid to high-end guitars.

products.type: 标准琴包 / Standard Gig Bag
products.description_cn: 标准5mm海绵琴包，基础保护。
products.description_en: Standard 5mm padded gig bag, basic protection.

products.type: 高档加厚琴包 / Premium Thick Gig Bag
products.features: 20mm海绵 + 防水面料 / 20mm padding + Waterproof fabric
products.description_cn: 高档20mm加厚琴包，防水面料，适合高档吉他。美国高端客户常配。
products.description_en: Premium 20mm thick padded gig bag, waterproof fabric. Commonly bundled with high-end guitars for US market.

products.type: 变调夹 / Capo
products.description_cn: 合金变调夹，适用于民谣/电吉他。
products.description_en: Alloy capo for acoustic/electric guitar.

products.type: 背带 / Guitar Strap
products.description_cn: 编织背带，可调节长度。
products.description_en: Woven adjustable strap.

products.type: 民谣吉他弦套装 / Acoustic String Set
products.description_cn: 磷铜民谣吉他弦，备用套装。
products.description_en: Phosphor bronze acoustic guitar string set, spare pack.

products.type: 夹式调音器 / Clip-on Tuner
products.description_cn: 夹式电子调音器，适用于吉他/尤克里里/贝斯。
products.description_en: Clip-on electronic tuner for guitar/ukulele/bass.

products.type: 拨片套装 / Pick Set
products.description_cn: 6片装混合厚度拨片套装。
products.description_en: 6-piece mixed thickness pick set.

category: OEM/ODM 定制服务 / OEM/ODM Services

info.description_cn: Smiger (维音乐器) 提供全面的OEM/ODM吉他制造服务。工厂位于广东，拥有完整的生产线和品控体系。支持从产品设计到成品包装的全流程定制。
info.description_en: Smiger offers comprehensive OEM/ODM guitar manufacturing. Factory in Guangdong with complete production line and QC system. Full-process customization from product design to finished packaging.
capabilities: 自定义琴身形状和木材选择 / Custom body shapes and wood selections
自定义饰面：高光、哑光、缎面、开放漆、擦色 / Custom finish: gloss, matte, satin, open pore, stained
自定义拾音器和电子配置 / Custom pickup and electronics configurations
LOGO印刷、琴头设计、自定义镶嵌 / Logo printing, headstock design, custom inlays
自定义包装和零售即用包装 / Custom packaging and retail-ready boxing
私人品牌标签和品牌开发支持 / Private labeling and brand development support
info.moq_cn: OEM: 120把起订(每型号60把, 每颜色30把); ODM全定制: 200把起订
info.moq_en: OEM: MOQ 120pcs (60 per model, 30 per color); Full ODM custom: MOQ 200pcs
info.lead_time_cn: OEM: 45-60天(支付定金和确认设计稿后); ODM: 60-90天
info.lead_time_en: OEM: 45-60 days after deposit and confirmed design; ODM: 60-90 days
info.factory_location: 广东省, 中国 / Guangdong, China
info.export_experience: 出口50+国家 / Exporting to 50+ countries
